source: Trascritto a piena risoluzione (game/assets/cards/country/, carte grandi 745x1040). 33 carte distinte; il mazzo Market contiene ~66 carte (in genere 2 copie ciascuna, art ids country_051..115). market_cost = numero accanto al nome (🔍). top_bonus + research_bonus = box in alto a sx (guadagnati in fase Research). type = colore barra (diplomatic/economic/military/domestic; 'mixed' = piu' azioni).

cards.effect_text: Produce 1 resource type. Then, Get a Growth Card.
Improve Relations with 2 Countries on the board.
Produce 1 Army. Then, Move up to 3 Armies.
Gain 4 money for each FDI token on your allied Countries. Then, Invest in an allied Country.
Choose a Region. Trade, considering that Region's available Countries on the board as allied Countries. Then, Reset 1 of your temporary Influence in that Region.
Improve Relations with a Country on the board. Then, Invest in that Country or Trade.
Trash this card when you play it. Research a card costing up to 6 Research for free and immediately Play it.
Trade. Then, Invest in an allied Country.
Produce 1 Army. Then, Build a Base in an allied Country.
Engage in a Region, spending 1 Diplomacy less for each allied Country you have from the same Region.
Improve Relations with a Country on the board. Then, if able, Build a Base in that Country, or Move up to 2 Armies to that Country's Region, even if you don't have a Base there.
Draw 2 cards. Then, Play another card.
Improve Relations with a Country on the board, spending 1 Diplomacy less. You can then Reset 1 of your temporary Influence in that Country's Region.
Gain 10 money. Then, Invest in an allied Country.
Trade a resource type. (You can either Export or Import it.) Then, Play another card.
Draw 3 cards. You can then discard 2 cards to Play another card.
Build a Base in an allied Country. You can choose a Country even if you have already built a Base in it once before (but only once).
Invest in an allied Country. You can choose a Country even if you have already invested in it once before (but only once).
Move up to 3 Armies. You can then Reset 1 of your temporary Influence in 1 of the Regions you moved your Armies to.
Ready up to 2 allied Country cards. Then, Engage in a Region.
Build a Base in an allied Country. You can move up to 3 Armies to its Region, regardless of the Country's value and without paying their move cost.
Choose any 2, in any order: Improve Relations with a Country on the board; Trade; Move up to 2 Armies.
Ready an allied Country. Then, Invest in that Country without exhausting it.
Choose a resource type. Increase its Production by 1 (if able) and Produce it. Then, Play another card.
Produce 1 Consumer Goods. Then, you can either increase your Prosperity, spending 2 Consumer Goods less, or Play another card.
Improve Relations with a Country on the board. You can then Engage in that Country's Region.
Build a Base in an allied Country. When adding Influence to its Region as part of the action, you can place it as permanent Influence even if there is no available slot.
Engage in a Region, spending 1 Diplomacy less for each Army you have in that Region.
Draw a card. You can then Trash a card from your hand or your discard pile to Play another card.
Gain 2 Diplomacy. Then, Improve Relations with a Country on the board or Engage in a Region.
Choose a Region and Reset 1 of your temporary Influence there. Then, Draw a card and Play another card.

Ready an allied Country. You can then search the Country cards on the board of any 1 Region, choose 1 of those Countries, and Improve Relations with it. Shuffle the rest of the cards afterward and reveal the first 2 on the board.
Draw a card. Then, Build a Base in an allied Country.
